criteria.name: Personalized Learning
criteria.description: The app uses AI to tailor the learning experience based on individual needs, preferences, and learning styles, providing custom content and learning paths.

criteria.name: Usability
criteria.description: The app has a user-friendly interface and seamless integration with existing systems, making it easy for both teachers and students to use.

criteria.name: Impact on Learning Outcomes
criteria.description: The app improves student performance, engagement, and overall learning experience, demonstrating measurable benefits in student learning.

criteria.name: Efficiency
criteria.description: The app automates tasks such as assessments, recommendations, and progress tracking, improving efficiency for educators and students.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The app introduces new methods or concepts that improve educational experiences, offering unique features that set it apart from traditional methods.
